description: Address review findings: truncate exception messages in API responses, delegate bot _extract_ticker to shared utils, add timeout to parallel coordinator, remove ALL from STOP_WORDS
steps: In src/augur/registry.py _analyze_single: truncate exception message to first line, max 200 chars in reasoning field
In src/augur/registry.py analyze_with_all: add timeout=30 to future.result(), handle TimeoutError with ERROR response
In src/augur/bots/telegram_bot.py handle_message exception reply: limit str(e) to first 100 chars
In all 4 bot files: replace _extract_ticker function body to delegate to augur.bots.utils.extract_ticker
In src/augur/bots/utils.py: remove ALL from STOP_WORDS (it is a real S&P 500 ticker - Allstate)
Update test_extract_filters_stop_words if needed due to ALL removal
acceptance_criteria: Exception reasoning in _analyze_single is truncated to first line, max 200 chars
future.result(timeout=30) is used in coordinator, TimeoutError handled
Telegram handle_message exception reply truncates to 100 chars
All 4 bot _extract_ticker functions delegate to shared utils.extract_ticker
